svg.text: different audio fingerprints / same engine / macro cloth changes by song

g.desc: Reversible Sound Cloth Engine. The source audio becomes a distorted black cloth: outer_cloth, pressure_field, memory_weave, tension_lines, impact_marks, cloth_time_grid, and wrapped_pcm_memory. A 100-pass audio-fingerprint morphology search chooses the macro silhouette, so different songs produce visibly different cloth shapes. Restoration PCM is added as pcm_reversible_data on export.
